creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://lists.freebsd.org/search>

- the FreeBSD logo (graphic) at the head of the page, linking to 
  <https://www.freebsd.org/>

- FreeBSD logo (two words, non-graphic), near the foot of the page. 

I guess, the footer will evolve to something like the footer at <https://docs.freebsd.org/>. In the meantime, maybe make the two words invisible. 

Thanks

Partly related: bug 264754 comment 12.
